title: ADOPTION AND RESCUE - 211info
text: PIXIE PROJECT ADOPTION AND RESCUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adoption services for people looking for cats or dogs, focusing on finding life-long matches. Works with county shelters and rescues to offer support when they become overcrowded. Animals are examined by a veterinarian and thoroughly screened before entering the adoption center. All animals are spayed or neutered, vaccinated, and microchipped. Accepts owner-surrendered cats as time and circumstances allow. Also displays "courtesy posts" of animals needing to be rehomed on website. 510 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Call or visit website for more information Hours: Tuesday-Friday 11am-6pm, Saturday 11am-4pm by appointment Email (503) 542-3432 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 542-3432 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information. FEES: Varies by pet DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: By appointment only TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: South of the Oregon Convention Center between NE Lloyd Boulevard and NE Hoyt Streets next to the Spirit of '77 restaurant. Free parking in shared lot North of the building entrance, if available. On TriMet and Max lines. Services: Animal Adoption Animal Rehoming Listing Services Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PIXIE CARE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PIXIE PROJECT
